---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or functionality
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'feature, enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Summary
<!-- Brief one-liner describing the feature -->

## 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail -->

## 🎨 User Experience
<!-- How will users interact with this feature? Include mockups if possible -->

## 🏗️ Components Affected
<!-- Which parts of the system will be involved? -->
- [ ] Frontend UI/UX
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Real-time Collaboration (WebSocket/Yjs)
- [ ] Database Schema
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization
- [ ] File Storage
- [ ] Documentation

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What must be true for this feature to be considered complete? -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## 🔄 User Stories
<!-- Optional: Add user stories if applicable -->
**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [goal]
**So that** [benefit]

## 🛠️ Technical Considerations
<!-- Any technical constraints, dependencies, or approaches to consider? -->

## 📊 Effort Estimation
- [ ] XS - Few hours
- [ ] S - 1-2 days  
- [ ] M - 3-5 days
- [ ] L - 1-2 weeks
- [ ] XL - 2+ weeks

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Critical - Core functionality
- [ ] High - Important for user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future consideration

## 🔗 Related Issues
- Related to #
- Depends on #

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, research, competitor examples, etc. -->
